navbar_placeholder: e.g., What are symptoms of pneumonia?
disclaimer_text: This information is for educational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice.
chat_description: Ask medical questions in English, Arabic, or French using retrieval-augmented generation.
onboarding_message: Try asking about pneumonia symptoms or TB diagnosis to start a demo-ready conversation.
ask_first_question: Ask your first question to start the conversation.
chat_placeholder: Type your question in English, Arabic, or French...
landing_hero_description: Deploy retrieval-augmented generation and medical imaging AI at scale. Real-time diagnosis support in Arabic, French, and English with verified source evidence and explainable confidence scoring.
landing_core_features_desc: Built for practical, explainable healthcare decision support.
landing_how_it_works_desc: A streamlined pipeline for multilingual consultation and imaging analysis.
feature_1_description: Real-time multilingual Q&A in Arabic, French, or English powered by retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) with source citation.
feature_2_description: Automated chest X-ray diagnosis with high-resolution classification and AI explainability reports in seconds.
feature_3_description: Full medical transparency with Grad-CAM visual reasoning, source attribution, and clinical confidence scoring.
step_1: Query medical knowledge base with hybrid retrieval (dense + sparse)
step_2: Apply medical response ranking and reliable fallback generation
step_3: Return structured answers with sources, confidence, and streaming UI
landing_disclaimer: This system is designed for educational and decision-support purposes only. It does not replace professional medical diagnosis. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider.
landing_production_config: Production Configuration: This system combines live service integration with automatic fallback to local models. Streaming responses are available for real-time feedback, and the platform is continuously monitored.
landing_footer_line1: Production-Ready RAG System with Real-Time Insights
landing_footer_line2: Modern web platform • secure retrieval • medical AI • streaming responses
footer_research_only: AI assistant for research purposes only.
vitals_description: Capture webcam-based heart rate and estimated vitals through the backend rPPG pipeline.
vitals_secure_capture_desc: Webcam-based rPPG measurement with backend processing.
vitals_quick_path_desc: Automatic capture for heart rate in about half a minute.
vitals_detailed_path_desc: Adjust duration when you need a longer, richer reading.
vitals_quick_desc: Runs an automated heart-rate capture. Expect the camera to stay active for roughly 30 to 35 seconds.
vitals_expect_desc: This is the fastest option when you only need a heart-rate snapshot. Keep your face visible and remain still while the camera records.
vitals_detailed_desc: Runs a configurable capture duration for a more tailored reading.
vitals_duration_reason_desc: Longer captures can improve signal stability when lighting or motion is less ideal. Keep the camera steady and let the full session finish.
vitals_summary_empty: Run a quick or detailed measure to populate this summary.
vitals_tip_1: Keep your face centered and remain still during capture.
vitals_tip_2: Use stable, indirect lighting for a cleaner signal.
vitals_tip_3: Allow camera access when prompted so the measurement can start.
vitals_offline_error: You are offline. Reconnect to measure vitals.
imaging_description: Upload chest X-rays for classification and explainability heatmaps.
imaging_upload_prompt: Drag and drop or click to upload X-ray
imaging_offline_error: You are offline. Reconnect to analyze images.
imaging_explainability_unavailable: Classification succeeded, but explainability heatmap is unavailable right now.
dashboard_mission_description: Access diagnostics, verified medical chat, and remote vitals in one premium operating surface.
dashboard_tool_imaging_description: Upload and analyze X-rays or CT scans using AI to detect diseases with Grad-CAM visual explanations.
dashboard_tool_chat_description: Consult our multi-lingual Hybrid RAG system for instant answers based on verified medical literature.
dashboard_tool_vitals_description: Measure your heart rate and estimate blood pressure instantly using your device's camera via rPPG technology.
dashboard_rec_use_more: Try using the platform more regularly to get better health insights
dashboard_rec_explore_more: You're doing well! Consider exploring more features
dashboard_rec_excellent: Excellent engagement! Keep up the great work
dashboard_rec_try_chat: Try the Chat Assistant to ask health-related questions
dashboard_rec_try_imaging: Upload a medical image for AI-powered analysis
dashboard_rec_try_vitals: Record your vital signs to track your health over time
dashboard_rec_inactive_week: You haven't been active this week. Check in with your health!
dashboard_rec_more_frequent: Consider checking your health metrics more frequently
